title: FMD - Both earbuds connected - Play button
scenario: Find My Device tone plays on both earbuds and stops correctly when Stop is tapped on Osprey in Lens app
steps: Open the Poly Lens app with an Osprey device connected.
Tap the headset card for Osprey.
expected: After tapping Play, a tone plays on both earbuds with flashing lights, a "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button and illustration appears. After tapping Stop, the state returns to the same as before playing the tone.
